security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; child-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; worker-src 'none'; child-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: VaultGuard is a local-first desktop password manager built with a Rust security boundary, encrypted JSON vault storage, progressive brute-force protection, and polished keyboard-first desktop workflows.
